name: Mystical Tae Kwon Crow
description: Mystical Tae Kwon Crow is a mystical counterpart of Tae Kwon Crow in Skylanders: Imaginators. The figure was exclusively sold at GameStop.
biography: Mystical Tae Kwon Crow is a mystical counterpart of Tae Kwon Crow in Skylanders: Imaginators. The figure was exclusively sold at GameStop.
personality: Not much is known about Mystical Tae Kwon Crow's personality, but as a Sensei, he is a master of the Ninja battle class.

story.content: Mystical Tae Kwon Crow is a mystical counterpart of Tae Kwon Crow in Skylanders: Imaginators. The figure was exclusively sold at GameStop.

trivia: Though his shurikens are red in the figure and official artwork, they have their original silver color in the game.
He and Mystical Bad Juju are the only Mystical counterparts of the franchise. Both are Senseis, and their original counterparts are both former villains.
gameplay: Mystical Tae Kwon Crow utilizes Ninja techniques, throwing shurikens and delivering flame-powered kicks to his enemies. His arsenal includes Shuriken Throw, Flame Kick, Buzzer Beak, and advanced versions like Triple Shurikens and Triple Kicks.

basic.name: Shuriken Throw
basic.content: Mystical Tae Kwon Crow throws a sharp shuriken at enemies from a distance.

basic.name: Flame Kick
basic.content: Mystical Tae Kwon Crow delivers a powerful kick imbued with fire.

basic_upgrades.name: Buzzer Beak
basic_upgrades.content: A specialized ninja technique used to strike down foes.

soulgems.name: Triple Shurikens
soulgems.content: Allows Mystical Tae Kwon Crow to throw three shurikens at once.

soulgems.name: Triple Kicks
soulgems.content: A powerful combination of three flaming kicks.
